name: Yu Mi Gee Yung Tang B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin, bone and mince chicken breasts.
2. Combine chicken, egg whites, salt and oil. Mix well and set aside.
3. Bring chicken broth to a boil in a saucepan. Add cream corn, salt and sugar; cook for one minute.
4. Stir in dissolved cornstarch and cook, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens.
5. Mix chicken mixture into soup and bring to a boil again.
6. Remove from heat. Add chopped scallions and serve immediately.
